query:
-- 首先查询批次ID和客户ID
SELECT pv.id as variantId, c.id as customerId
FROM product_variants pv
CROSS JOIN companies c
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V001'
AND c.companyName = 'ABC Furniture';

-- 插入客户关联记录
INSERT INTO variant_customer_links (variantId, customerId, createdAt)
SELECT pv.id, c.id, NOW()
FROM product_variants pv
CROSS JOIN companies c
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V001'
AND c.companyName = 'ABC Furniture'
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM variant_customer_links vcl
  WHERE vcl.variantId = pv.id AND vcl.customerId = c.id
);
